content: The standard Self-Refine framework for LLMs, which relies on single-perspective iterative self-feedback, can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective self-refine pipeline that still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning. This hybrid approach addresses the common blind-spot limitation of single-perspective self-feedback, where an LLM cannot catch flaws it does not recognize from its default framing.
